body: Quick note, revised manuscript on track, full response to reviewers to follow.\n\n- Martha
subject: Re: JVGR-2026-0412: Decision - minor revisions

body: Can we move the Tuesday partner call thirty minutes earlier?
subject: Can we move the Tuesday partner call thirty minutes earlier?

body: Field window looks good Thursday, Halldor confirmed the helicopter.
subject: Field window looks good Thursday, Halldor confirmed the helicopter.

body: Uploaded the Krysuvik flux data to the shared folder, please review.
subject: Uploaded the Krysuvik flux data to the shared folder, please review.

body: Calibration came back clean on the MultiGAS unit.
subject: Calibration came back clean on the MultiGAS unit.

body: Drafting the Katla chapter this week, will send for comments Friday.
subject: Drafting the Katla chapter this week, will send for comments Friday.

body: Seismicity around Svartsengi is elevated again, watching it closely.
subject: Seismicity around Svartsengi is elevated again, watching it closely.

body: Confirmed the conference travel dates, booking flights now.
subject: Confirmed the conference travel dates, booking flights now.

body: Student figures look strong, a couple of small edits on the legend.
subject: Student figures look strong, a couple of small edits on the legend.

body: Newsletter draft is ready, sending to the consortium list tomorrow.
subject: Newsletter draft is ready, sending to the consortium list tomorrow.

body: Reviewed the platform ingestion errors, filed two fixes.
subject: Reviewed the platform ingestion errors, filed two fixes.

body: Quiet inter eruption phase right now, magma still accumulating.
subject: Quiet inter eruption phase right now, magma still accumulating.

body: Thanks for the quick turnaround on the data export.
subject: Thanks for the quick turnaround on the data export.

body: Let us keep the briefing short, just the key hazard points.
subject: Let us keep the briefing short, just the key hazard points.

body: Good catch on the baseline gap, adding it to the action list.
subject: Good catch on the baseline gap, adding it to the action list.

body: Running late from the field, start the call without me.
subject: Running late from the field, start the call without me.

body: Booked the lobster soup spot for the team dinner after the seminar.
subject: Booked the lobster soup spot for the team dinner after the seminar.

subject: Weather is closing in on the highland site, postponing the run.

subject: The Reykjanes dashboard is back up after the maintenance window.

subject: Sending the spectrometer part back to the manufacturer for service.
